description: The Porsche 944, produced from 1982 to 1991, was Porsche's best-selling model of the 1980s. Its front-mounted four-cylinder with rear transaxle delivered near-perfect 50/50 weight distribution. The Turbo S with 250 bhp is the most collectible, while the S2 with its 3.0-litre engine offers the best naturally aspirated performance.
